name: flint-components
description: Browse and preview Flint A2UI components from your live registry. Query the component catalog, inspect props, and get HTMX previews directly in OpenDesign.
author: prometheus-ags

skills.name: Component Browser
skills.description: Browse and search the Flint component catalog. Lists all 55 base components with props, categories, and descriptions.

category.description: Filter by category: layout, input, action, navigation, feedback, data-display, system

app_id.description: Include app-scoped components for this application UUID

skills.name: Surface Preview
skills.description: Render any Flint component as an HTML preview using the HTMX renderer. Pass a component slug and optional JSON props.

gatewayUrl.label: Flint Gateway URL
gatewayUrl.description: Base URL of your fdb-gateway instance (e.g. https://api.example.com)

bearerToken.label: JWT Bearer Token
bearerToken.description: Authentication token for the Flint gateway
